workspace.noPosts: No posts yet for this topic.
workspace.noPublicPosts: No public posts from you in this topic yet.
workspace.communityNodeUnavailableBody: A configured community node is currently unavailable. Startup continues, and direct P2P connections remain available.

report.title: Report content
report.boundaryNotice: This report is sent to a specific community node, not to the kukuri network as a whole.
report.boundaryDetail: The target node is one that actually indexed, moderated, cached, or recommended this content. kukuri has no central abuse intake.
report.identityBoundaryNote: Your identity, profile, and social graph are not owned by any node and are not handed over for this report.

contact.endpoint: Submitted to the node report endpoint

report.criticalSafetyNote: Critical safety reports are routed to the responsible node. Do not attach or redistribute the material itself; describe it instead.
report.detailsPlaceholder: Describe the problem. Do not paste the offending material.
report.reporterContactPlaceholder: Email or handle the node can use to follow up
report.reporterContactHint: Only shared if you enter it. Leave blank to report anonymously.
report.success: Report sent to the community node.
report.unknownBody: It is not clear which node or source surfaced this content, so there is no responsible community node to report to.
report.observedUnresolvedBody: A node surfaced this content but its manifest or report contact is unavailable, so the report cannot be routed.
report.localActionsHint: You can still block, mute, or hide this locally.
